channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Reporting again - communical bin not emptied for two weeks, 2nd April
item.description:
Tihs has been reported previously but ignored - the large communal bin, overflowing and surrounded by rubbish needs emptying urgently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Church Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bus shelter near bus stop R and SH, 2nd April
item.description:
There’s rascist abusive graffiti on the bus shelters bus stop R and SG plus near Kent Rd facing the boat pond on the billboard which needs removing asap Piease . I think it’s best to check all the bus shelters from R + SG right up to the high street because this isn’t nice to see .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenoaks Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on corner, 2nd April
item.description:
More fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hoxton Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thames Water checked the drain by the corner of Weston Road ( no 63) by Mooreland Road and said it requires cleaning by the council, 2nd April
item.description:
Drain very smelly ?? Sewage type smell reported to Thames Water who inspected all the drains just now using a camera and believe the gulley needs cleaning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Mooreland Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New LED light fitted recently, 2nd April
item.description:
Hello I just wanted to check this light was fitted recently and I was wondering is there something missing like a cover? I thought it would be much brighter. it seems to get a lot of light to the left and right but not much in the middle.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bliss Crescent, Lewisham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog waste, Tyres St, SE1, 2nd April
item.description:
Please clear dog waste

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13-56, Tyers Gate, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly Tipping on Street problem has been found, 2nd April
item.description:
Some items have been fly-tipped where the WEE bank and Traid bank use to be

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Downs Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 29 Goldhurst Terrace, 2nd April
item.description:
Blocked internally
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Goldhurst Terrace, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike blocking pavement, 2nd April
item.description:
Blocking pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alderney Street, Pimlico, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped items, 2nd April
item.description:
Furniture & lawnmower dumped by railway footbridge

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly Tipping In Bin area problem has been found, 2nd April
item.description:
Fly tipped bulky items in Hackney Housing bin store

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead animal- 3rd report!!, 2nd April
item.description:
3rd report of the same dead fox! Sunday and yesterday! Yet being marked as not found! I have added a picture to locate the fox! In front of black garages on corner of Sewell Road/church manor way! If you park by the bus stop opposite the maisonettes 162/161 and walk to the black garages you will see the very decaying fox. There are lots of children that use this bus stop and it’s very upsetting to see!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sewell Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing half of drain hole cover, 2nd April
item.description:
Half a drain cover is missing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 224, Finchley Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins nor collected today, 2nd April
item.description:
The waste food was collected, but not recycling or general waste. So everybody’s bins are still out on the pavement.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pellerin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement obstructed, 2nd April
item.description:
Shop is “displaying” white goods on pavement causing an obstruction and interfering with safe use of pedestrian crossing
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ripon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 2nd April
item.description:
A pile of household rubbish (inc furniture & mattres) dumped on grass verge. Appears to be an end of tenancy clear out. Top of Ripon Rd adjacent to Cantwell Rd
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ripon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Same fly tipper!, 2nd April
item.description:
Time and time again the same person is getting away with this at tax payers expense and ruining our local area. Please activate the camera and end this problem which has occurred regularly for over a year now. They must be local!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Methuen Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged drain/pothole, 2nd April
item.description:
When you drive along Clifford Avenue, past a house called Garton Lodge and a car is coming the other way, you have to drive over the damaged drain/pothole causing the car to drop down the hole.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clifford Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 2nd April
item.description:
This fly tipping has been untouched in the same place for at least 7 days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bouverie Mews, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bathroom toilet left by communal bins, 2nd April
item.description:
This has been left outside the communal bins - not inside. It is clinical flying tipping of white goods. It has also been used - ie has human waste in the toilet which is unplumbed and left abandoned

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redcross Way, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
